name: Apple Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and finely chop the apples.
2. Mix with sugar, spices, raisins, nuts, and 2 tablespoons of melted butter.
3. Unwrap phyllo dough and keep between two dampened tea towels.
4. Place one sheet of dough on a third tea towel. Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
5. Place second sheet of phyllo on top of the first, brush with butter, and sprinkle with crumbs. Repeat with remaining sheets of phyllo.
6. Spread apple filling about two inches along one long side of the dough, leaving at least two inches from each edge. The filling should be spread to a width of three inches.
7. Fold the long side over once to cover the filling, then fold in the edges.
8. Continue rolling lengthwise, like a jelly roll, using the tea towels to help.
9. Brush each roll with butter and place seam-side down on a lightly buttered baking sheet.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for about 20-25 minutes, until golden.
11. Remove from oven and score top into 1-1/2 inch slices with a sharp knife.
12. Cool and cut into slices.
